items.headline: The Athletic: Donovan Mitchell and the Cavs’ quest for postseason glory
items.description: The Cavs have been chasing James’ ghost since he left Cleveland. This is the closest they've come to the East finals without him since 1992.

items.headline: Grizzlies' Brandon Clarke passes away at 29
items.description: The seven-year NBA veteran played his entire career with the Grizzlies and was the No. 21 pick in 2019.

items.headline: LeBron James hasn’t decided whether to return for a 24th NBA season
items.description: LeBron James says he has no idea whether his 24-point performance in the Los Angeles Lakers’ playoff loss was the final game of his NBA career.

items.headline: Luka Dončić says he wasn’t close to returning from injury
items.description: Luka Dončić says he never got close to being healthy enough to rejoin the Los Angeles Lakers in the playoffs.

items.headline: Victor Wembanyama, young Spurs continue to learn playoff lessons
items.description: Former NBA player C.J. Miles examines how Victor Wembanyama and San Antonio are handling playoff pressure.

items.headline: Yahoo Sports Mock Draft: The Wizards won the lottery! Here's how every pick could play out now
items.description: Yahoo Sports NBA senior analyst Kevin O'Connor checks in with his latest mock draft now that the Wizards are on the clock.

items.headline: Starting 5: OKC advances, Cavs stay alive and a look at Game 5 of Wolves-Spurs
items.description: The Thunder drop the Lakers late to clinch the series, Donovan Mitchell ignites in Game 4 and we preview Game 5 of Wolves-Spurs.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Timberwolves Game 5
items.description: Victor Wembanyama missed Game 4's key moments after an early ejection, and Game 5 may hinge on the impact he makes for the Spurs.

items.headline: Recap: Cavaliers tie series against Pistons, Thunder advance
items.description: Enjoy the best highlights from Monday's Playoff action, featuring Pistons-Cavaliers and Thunder-Lakers, with the NBA.com live blog.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Thunder guards push OKC to sweep over Lakers
items.description: The Thunder withstand the Lakers' late surge in Game 4, finishing a semifinals sweep to remain perfect in the playoffs.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Donovan Mitchell fuels huge 3rd quarter, Game 4 victory for Cavaliers
items.description: The home teams have held court through four games and now it’s best-of-3. In this situation, it’s usually up to the stars to decide things.

items.headline: Heat legend Alonzo Mourning travels Rob Pimental's transplant journey with him
items.description: Hall of Famer Alonzo Mourning is helping Rob Pimental, the team's director of team operations, manage his health challenges.

items.headline: Expectations already sky-high for the 2026 NBA Draft class, and the picks are still weeks away
items.description: This year’s Draft class is already setting high expectations after the Wizards won the Draft Lottery on May 10.

items.headline: The Athletic: Brunson’s Knicks legacy is still being written, but it’s already quite good
items.description: The Knicks have become legit title contenders under Jalen Brunson. No one expected that.

items.headline: The Athletic: In Post-Lottery Mock Draft, AJ Dybantsa to Wizards; Darryn Peterson to Jazz
items.description: Washington won big at the Draft Lottery, but there are plenty of potential difference-makers in this class, writes The Athletic's Sam Vecenie.
